name: Salsa, Banana
recipeIngredient: 3 whole scallions, trimmed and finely chopped
salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all of the ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Gently toss to mix thoroughly.
3. Correct the seasonings by adding salt, lime juice, or sugar as desired.
4. The salsa should have a balance of sweetness and acidity.
5. Allow the salsa to sit for a couple hours before serving to allow flavors to develop.
6. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
